author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings @Game Pings 

Crew Utility in Star Atlas: Golden Era - LIVE

Hey everyone, Crew utility in SAGE is now LIVE! Thank you for your patience as we push out the update.

That means that each of your Crew members is now a unique, individual cNFT, no longer bound to any specific ship.  

Known Issue: Passengers cannot disembark while Hotwallet is enabled. Workaround: Disable Hotwallet. (This should be fixed within the next couple hours) FIXED

 | https://based.staratlas.com/
